name: Cold-call Agent
description: Outbound voice agent that calls queued leads via Twilio + ElevenLabs, streams live transcripts into the pipeline, qualifies prospects, and books demos. Pairs with the BDR Pipeline.

integrations.description: Place outbound calls and stream synthesized voice via Twilio + ElevenLabs
Book demos directly into the user's calendar when a prospect agrees
Sync call outcomes and qualification notes back to CRM
Alert the team on demo-booked or hot leads
